translations.en: The waiter will be right here.
translations.fr: Le serveur arrive tout de suite.
translations.ja: 店員さんはすぐ来ます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; determiner of 'Kellner' marking it as the subject.
Common noun; masculine; nominative singular; syntactic subject of 'kommt'.
Finite verb; 3rd person singular present indicative; main predicate; agrees with the nominative subject 'Kellner'.
Temporal adverb modifying 'kommt' indicating near future.

sentences.target: Ich kenne den Kellner von gestern.

translations.de: Ich kenne den Kellner von gestern.
translations.en: I know the waiter from yesterday.
translations.zh-Hans: 我认识昨天那位服务员。
translations.ru: Я знаю этого официанта со вчера.
translations.pt: Eu conheço o garçom de ontem.
translations.vi: Tôi biết người phục vụ từ hôm qua.
translations.nl: Ik ken de ober van gisteren.
translations.hi: मैं कल वाले वेटर को जानता हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg kjenner servitøren fra i går.
translations.ro: Îl cunosc pe chelnerul de ieri.
translations.da: Jeg kender tjeneren fra i går.
translations.ja: 昨日の店員さんを知っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of 'kenne'.
Finite verb; 1st person singular present indicative; transitive, governing the accusative object 'den Kellner'.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; determiner marking 'Kellner' as the direct object.
Common noun; masculine; accusative singular; direct object of 'kenne'.
Preposition selecting (typically) dative; introduces the prepositional phrase 'von gestern' functioning as an adverbial (source/time) modifier.
Temporal adverb serving as complement to 'von' in the PP 'von gestern'; yields a time/source adjunct to the clause.

sentences.target: Lisa winkt dem Kellner am Fenster.

translations.de: Lisa winkt dem Kellner am Fenster.
translations.en: Lisa waves to the waiter by the window.
translations.es: Lisa saluda con la mano al camarero junto a la ventana.
translations.fr: Lisa fait un signe de la main au serveur près de la fenêtre.
translations.it: Lisa saluta con la mano il cameriere vicino alla finestra.
translations.ko: 리사가 창가 쪽 웨이터에게 손을 흔들어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 丽莎向窗边的服务员挥手。
translations.yue: 麗莎向窗邊嗰位侍應揮手。
translations.pt: Lisa acena para o garçom perto da janela.
translations.tr: Lisa cam kenarındaki garsona el sallıyor.
translations.vi: Lisa vẫy tay với người phục vụ ở cạnh cửa sổ.
translations.nl: Lisa zwaait naar de ober bij het raam.
translations.hu: Lisa int az ablaknál lévő pincérnek.
translations.hi: लीसा खिड़की के पास वाले वेटर को हाथ हिला रही है।
translations.pl: Lisa macha do kelnera przy oknie.
translations.el: Η Λίζα χαιρετά τον σερβιτόρο δίπλα στο παράθυρο.
translations.nb: Lisa vinker til servitøren ved vinduet.
translations.id: Lisa melambai ke pelayan di dekat jendela.
translations.sv: Lisa vinkar till servitören vid fönstret.
translations.ro: Lisa îi face cu mâna chelnerului de lângă fereastră.
translations.da: Lisa vinker til tjeneren ved vinduet.
translations.fi: Lisa vilkuttaa ikkunan vieressä olevalle tarjoilijalle.
translations.ja: リサは窓際の店員さんに手を振っています。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun; nominative singular; subject of 'winkt'.
Finite verb; 3rd person singular present indicative; intransitive but commonly takes a dative recipient ('jemandem winken').
Definite article; dative masculine singular; determiner of 'Kellner' marking the dative recipient.
Common noun; masculine; dative singular; indirect object/recipient of 'winkt'.
Preposition (contracted 'an' + 'dem'); governs dative; introduces a locative PP.
Common noun; neuter; dative singular as object of 'am'; locative complement.

sentences.target: Wir warten auf den Kellner mit der Rechnung.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈvaʁtən aʊ̯f deːn ˈkɛlnɐ mɪt deːɐ̯ ˈʁɛçnʊŋ/

translations.de: Wir warten auf den Kellner mit der Rechnung.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈvaʁtən aʊ̯f deːn ˈkɛlnɐ mɪt deːɐ̯ ˈʁɛçnʊŋ/
translations.en: We are waiting for the waiter with the bill.
translations.es: Estamos esperando al camarero con la cuenta.
translations.fr: Nous attendons le serveur avec l'addition.
translations.it: Stiamo aspettando il cameriere con il conto.
translations.ko: 우리는 계산서를 들고 오는 웨이터를 기다리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在等拿账单的服务员。
translations.yue: 我哋等緊拎住單嘅侍應。
translations.pt: Estamos esperando o garçom com a conta.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đợi người phục vụ mang hóa đơn.
translations.nl: We wachten op de ober met de rekening.
translations.hi: हम बिल वाले वेटर का इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं।
translations.el: Περιμένουμε τον σερβιτόρο με τον λογαριασμό.
translations.nb: Vi venter på servitøren med regningen.
translations.id: Kami menunggu pelayan yang membawa tagihan.
translations.sv: Vi väntar på servitören med notan.
translations.ro: Așteptăm chelnerul cu nota de plată.
translations.da: Vi venter på tjeneren med regningen.
translations.ja: 私たちはお会計を持ってくる店員さんを待っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural nominative; subject of 'warten'.
Finite verb; 1st person plural present indicative; takes a prepositional complement with 'auf' + accusative.
Preposition used with 'warten' to form the construction 'auf + Acc' meaning 'to wait for'; governs accusative.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Kellner' as object of the preposition 'auf'.
Common noun; masculine; accusative singular; object of 'auf'; semantic target of the waiting.
Preposition governing dative; introduces an additional PP that can attach either to the NP ('den Kellner') or to the clause.
Definite article; dative feminine singular; determiner of 'Rechnung' as object of 'mit'.

Common noun; feminine; dative singular as object of 'mit'; PP 'mit der Rechnung' typically modifies 'den Kellner' (the waiter with the bill), though clause-level attachment ('we wait with the bill') is also possible.
